nodes.label: Next.js Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: Agents are instructed to read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing any Next.js code because this version has breaking changes from training data — APIs, conventions, and file structure may differ.

nodes.label: Free/Pro Tier Logic
nodes.rationale: Free users see 1 signal/day (randomly selected by date); Pro users see all active signals grouped by BUY/HOLD/SELL. Stripe checkout triggers webhook which updates user tier column in DB.

nodes.label: Admin User Access Control
nodes.rationale: Admin access to /admin/signals is gated by matching Clerk user ID against ADMIN_USER_ID env var, not a role system.
